---
title: "Automated Missing Coordinate Search"
author: "AAF"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(mapview)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
source("setup.R")
```

# ==========================================
# 1. READ WSD AND FIND MISSING SOURCES
# ==========================================
```{r load_wsd}
wsd_path <- "data/Water_Supply_Systems/NPS_Water_Systems_Database_Joined.xlsx"
source_table <- read_excel(wsd_path, sheet = 1, skip = 1)

is_missing <- function(x) {
  is.na(x) | trimws(as.character(x)) %in% c("", "NA", "NaN")
}

missing <- source_table %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    region %in% c("Southeast Region", "Pacific West Region"),
    is_missing(source_longitude) | is_missing(source_latitude)
  )

cat("Missing coordinate sources:", nrow(missing), "\n")
```

# ==========================================
# 2. KEYWORD EXTRACTOR
# ==========================================
```{r keyword_function}
extract_keywords <- function(system_name) {
  clean <- system_name
  # Strip Tent DELETE prefix
  clean <- gsub("^Tent\\.?\\s*(DELETE|DELTE)\\s*-?\\s*", "", clean, ignore.case = TRUE)
  clean <- gsub("^DELETE\\s*-?\\s*", "", clean, ignore.case = TRUE)
  # Strip unit code prefix (e.g., "OH -", "CC -", "PH UTIL")
  clean <- gsub("^[A-Z]{2,4}\\s*(-|UTIL)\\s*", "", clean)
  clean <- trimws(clean)
  
  # Split into words
  words <- unlist(strsplit(clean, "[\\s,/&]+"))
  
  # Remove short and generic words
  drop <- c("water", "system", "well", "the", "and", "for", "area", "non",
            "potable", "irrigation", "pump", "dist", "distribution",
            "emergency", "tent", "delete", "delte", "util", "planned",
            "excess", "gal", "tank", "above", "ground", "line", "main")
  words <- words[nchar(words) >= 3 & !tolower(words) %in% drop]
  
  unique(words)
}
```

# ==========================================
# 3. EMPTY RESULTS TEMPLATE
# ==========================================
```{r empty_template}
empty_results <- tibble(
  wsd_source_id        = character(),
  park_unit            = character(),
  water_system_name    = character(),
  match_database       = character(),
  match_name           = character(),
  match_type           = character(),
  search_keyword       = character(),
  longitude            = numeric(),
  latitude             = numeric(),
  well_id              = character(),
  well_status          = character(),
  well_depth_ft        = numeric(),
  well_use             = character(),
  aquifer              = character(),
  dist_to_nearest_well = numeric()
)
```

# ==========================================
# 4. SEARCH FUNCTION (buildings + POIs + wells)
# ==========================================
```{r search_function}
search_all <- function(keywords, bldg_all, pois_all, park_wells, src_row) {
  
  # Start with properly structured empty tibble
  results <- empty_results
  
  for (kw in keywords) {
    
    # --- BUILDINGS ---
    if (!is.null(bldg_all) && nrow(bldg_all) > 0) {
      hits <- tryCatch({
        bldg_all %>%
          st_transform(4326) %>%
          st_centroid() %>%
          mutate(X = st_coordinates(.)[,1], Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
          filter(
            grepl(kw, MAPLABEL, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, BLDGNAME, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, BLDGALTNAM, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, BLDGTYPE, ignore.case = TRUE)
          )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(hits) && nrow(hits) > 0) {
        results <- bind_rows(results, hits %>%
          st_drop_geometry() %>%
          transmute(
            wsd_source_id        = src_row$wsd_source_id,
            park_unit            = src_row$park_unit,
            water_system_name    = src_row$water_system_name,
            match_database       = "NPS Buildings",
            match_name           = MAPLABEL,
            match_type           = BLDGTYPE,
            search_keyword       = kw,
            longitude            = X,
            latitude             = Y,
            well_id              = NA_character_,
            well_status          = NA_character_,
            well_depth_ft        = NA_real_,
            well_use             = NA_character_,
            aquifer              = NA_character_,
            dist_to_nearest_well = NA_real_
          ))
      }
    }
    
    # --- POIs ---
    if (!is.null(pois_all) && nrow(pois_all) > 0) {
      hits <- tryCatch({
        pois_all %>%
          st_transform(4326) %>%
          mutate(X = st_coordinates(.)[,1], Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
          filter(
            grepl(kw, MAPLABEL, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, NOTES, ignore.case = TRUE)
          )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(hits) && nrow(hits) > 0) {
        results <- bind_rows(results, hits %>%
          st_drop_geometry() %>%
          transmute(
            wsd_source_id        = src_row$wsd_source_id,
            park_unit            = src_row$park_unit,
            water_system_name    = src_row$water_system_name,
            match_database       = "NPS POIs",
            match_name           = MAPLABEL,
            match_type           = NA_character_,
            search_keyword       = kw,
            longitude            = X,
            latitude             = Y,
            well_id              = NA_character_,
            well_status          = NA_character_,
            well_depth_ft        = NA_real_,
            well_use             = NA_character_,
            aquifer              = NA_character_,
            dist_to_nearest_well = NA_real_
          ))
      }
    }
    
    # --- USGWD WELLS (keyword search in text columns) ---
    if (!is.null(park_wells) && nrow(park_wells) > 0) {
      hits <- tryCatch({
        park_wells %>%
          st_transform(4326) %>%
          mutate(X = st_coordinates(.)[,1], Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
          filter(
            grepl(kw, `Subwatershed-Name`, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, County, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, `USGS Water Use Category`, ignore.case = TRUE) |
            grepl(kw, `Aquifer-Specific`, ignore.case = TRUE)
          )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      
      if (!is.null(hits) && nrow(hits) > 0) {
        results <- bind_rows(results, hits %>%
          st_drop_geometry() %>%
          head(5) %>%
          transmute(
            wsd_source_id        = src_row$wsd_source_id,
            park_unit            = src_row$park_unit,
            water_system_name    = src_row$water_system_name,
            match_database       = "USGWD Well (keyword)",
            match_name           = `Subwatershed-Name`,
            match_type           = `USGS Water Use Category`,
            search_keyword       = kw,
            longitude            = X,
            latitude             = Y,
            well_id              = `Well ID`,
            well_status          = Status,
            well_depth_ft        = as.numeric(`Well Depth (Feet)`),
            well_use             = `USGS Water Use Category`,
            aquifer              = `Aquifer-Specific`,
            dist_to_nearest_well = NA_real_
          ))
      }
    }
  }
  
  # --- NEAREST WELLS to any building/POI match ---
  bldg_poi_matches <- if (nrow(results) > 0) {
    results %>% filter(match_database %in% c("NPS Buildings", "NPS POIs"))
  } else {
    tibble()
  }
  
  if (nrow(bldg_poi_matches) > 0 && !is.null(park_wells) && nrow(park_wells) > 0) {
    match_pts <- bldg_poi_matches %>%
      distinct(longitude, latitude) %>%
      st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
    
    wells_sf <- park_wells %>% st_transform(4326)
    
    for (i in 1:min(nrow(match_pts), 3)) {  # limit to first 3 unique match locations
      dists <- st_distance(match_pts[i,], wells_sf) %>% as.numeric()
      nearest_idx <- order(dists)[1:min(3, length(dists))]
      
      for (j in nearest_idx) {
        well_coord <- st_coordinates(wells_sf[j,])
        results <- bind_rows(results, tibble(
          wsd_source_id        = src_row$wsd_source_id,
          park_unit            = src_row$park_unit,
          water_system_name    = src_row$water_system_name,
          match_database       = "USGWD Well (nearest to bldg/POI)",
          match_name           = paste0("Nearest to: ", bldg_poi_matches$match_name[i]),
          match_type           = wells_sf$`USGS Water Use Category`[j],
          search_keyword       = NA_character_,
          longitude            = well_coord[1],
          latitude             = well_coord[2],
          well_id              = wells_sf$`Well ID`[j],
          well_status          = wells_sf$Status[j],
          well_depth_ft        = as.numeric(wells_sf$`Well Depth (Feet)`[j]),
          well_use             = wells_sf$`USGS Water Use Category`[j],
          aquifer              = wells_sf$`Aquifer-Specific`[j],
          dist_to_nearest_well = round(dists[j], 1)
        ))
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(results)
}
```

# ==========================================
# 5. MAIN LOOP
# ==========================================
```{r main_loop, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
all_results <- empty_results

# Cache to avoid re-downloading per park
cache <- list()

# State name lookup for USGWD file paths
state_lkp <- tigris::states() %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(STUSPS, NAME) %>%
  mutate(file_name = gsub(" ", "_", NAME))

parks_to_do <- unique(missing$park_unit)

for (park_code in parks_to_do) {
  
  park_rows <- missing %>% filter(park_unit == park_code)
  state_abbr <- unique(park_rows$state)[1]
  
  cat("\n==========================================\n")
  cat("Park:", park_code, "| State:", state_abbr, "| Sources:", nrow(park_rows), "\n")
  cat("==========================================\n")
  
  # --- Park boundary + AOI ---
  if (is.null(cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pb")]])) {
    tryCatch({
      cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pb")]] <- getParkBoundary(park_code) %>% st_transform(4326)
    }, error = function(e) cat("  ERROR boundary:", e$message, "\n"))
  }
  pb <- cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pb")]]
  if (is.null(pb)) next
  aoi <- pb %>% st_buffer(10000)
  
  # --- Buildings ---
  if (is.null(cache[[paste0(park_code, "_bldg")]])) {
    cache[[paste0(park_code, "_bldg")]] <- tryCatch(
      getBuildings(park_boundary = pb),
      error = function(e) { cat("  ERROR buildings:", e$message, "\n"); NULL }
    )
  }
  bldg_all <- cache[[paste0(park_code, "_bldg")]]
  
  # --- POIs ---
  if (is.null(cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pois")]])) {
    cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pois")]] <- tryCatch(
      get_pois(aoi),
      error = function(e) { cat("  ERROR POIs:", e$message, "\n"); NULL }
    )
  }
  pois_all <- cache[[paste0(park_code, "_pois")]]
  
  # --- USGWD wells for this state ---
  if (is.null(cache[[paste0(state_abbr, "_wells")]])) {
    st_info <- state_lkp %>% filter(STUSPS == state_abbr)
    if (nrow(st_info) > 0) {
      well_path <- paste0("data/Water_Supply_Systems/USGWD-Tabular/USGWD_", st_info$file_name[1], ".csv")
      if (file.exists(well_path)) {
        tryCatch({
          cache[[paste0(state_abbr, "_wells")]] <- read_csv(well_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
            filter(!is.na(Longitude) & !is.na(Latitude)) %>%
            st_as_sf(coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4269)
        }, error = function(e) cat("  ERROR USGWD:", e$message, "\n"))
      } else {
        cat("  USGWD file not found:", well_path, "\n")
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Filter wells to strictly inside park
  park_wells <- NULL
  if (!is.null(cache[[paste0(state_abbr, "_wells")]])) {
    park_wells <- tryCatch(
      cache[[paste0(state_abbr, "_wells")]] %>%
        st_filter(pb %>% st_transform(4269)),
      error = function(e) { cat("  ERROR filtering wells:", e$message, "\n"); NULL }
    )
    if (!is.null(park_wells)) cat("  Wells inside park:", nrow(park_wells), "\n")
  }
  
  # --- Search each source ---
  for (i in 1:nrow(park_rows)) {
    src <- park_rows[i, ]
    keywords <- extract_keywords(as.character(src$water_system_name))
    
    # Also add keywords from point_of_use
    if (!is.na(src$point_of_use) && !src$point_of_use %in% c("U", "u", "")) {
      pou_kw <- extract_keywords(as.character(src$point_of_use))
      keywords <- unique(c(keywords, pou_kw))
    }
    # Also add keywords from fmss_system_name
    if (!is.na(src$fmss_system_name) && nchar(as.character(src$fmss_system_name)) > 2) {
      fmss_kw <- extract_keywords(as.character(src$fmss_system_name))
      keywords <- unique(c(keywords, fmss_kw))
    }
    
    cat("  Source:", src$wsd_source_id, "| Keywords:", paste(keywords, collapse = ", "), "\n")
    
    matches <- tryCatch(
      search_all(keywords, bldg_all, pois_all, park_wells, src),
      error = function(e) {
        cat("    ERROR in search:", e$message, "\n")
        empty_results
      }
    )
    
    if (nrow(matches) > 0) {
      cat("    Found", nrow(matches), "matches\n")
      all_results <- bind_rows(all_results, matches)
    } else {
      cat("    NO MATCHES\n")
      all_results <- bind_rows(all_results, tibble(
        wsd_source_id        = src$wsd_source_id,
        park_unit            = park_code,
        water_system_name    = as.character(src$water_system_name),
        match_database       = "NONE",
        match_name           = NA_character_,
        match_type           = NA_character_,
        search_keyword       = paste(keywords, collapse = ", "),
        longitude            = NA_real_,
        latitude             = NA_real_,
        well_id              = NA_character_,
        well_status          = NA_character_,
        well_depth_ft        = NA_real_,
        well_use             = NA_character_,
        aquifer              = NA_character_,
        dist_to_nearest_well = NA_real_
      ))
    }
  }
}
```

# ==========================================
# 6. EXPORT TO EXCEL
# ==========================================
```{r export}
cat("\n\n========== SUMMARY ==========\n")
cat("Total matches:", nrow(all_results), "\n")
cat("Sources with matches:", all_results %>% filter(match_database != "NONE") %>%
      distinct(wsd_source_id) %>% nrow(), "\n")
cat("Sources with no matches:", all_results %>% filter(match_database == "NONE") %>%
      distinct(wsd_source_id) %>% nrow(), "\n")
cat("\nBy database:\n")
print(table(all_results$match_database))

# Sort: buildings first, then POIs, then nearest wells, then keyword wells, then NONE
all_results <- all_results %>%
  mutate(sort_order = case_when(
    match_database == "NPS Buildings" ~ 1,
    match_database == "NPS POIs" ~ 2,
    match_database == "USGWD Well (nearest to bldg/POI)" ~ 3,
    match_database == "USGWD Well (keyword)" ~ 4,
    TRUE ~ 5
  )) %>%
  arrange(wsd_source_id, sort_order, dist_to_nearest_well) %>%
  select(-sort_order)

write_xlsx(all_results, "missing_coords_search_results.xlsx")
cat("\nExported to: missing_coords_search_results.xlsx\n")
```

# ==========================================
# 7. INTERACTIVE REVIEW (change park_code)
# ==========================================
```{r review, eval=FALSE}
review_park <- "EVER"

pb <- cache[[paste0(review_park, "_pb")]]
bldg_all <- cache[[paste0(review_park, "_bldg")]]
pois_all <- cache[[paste0(review_park, "_pois")]]
state_abbr <- (missing %>% filter(park_unit == review_park))$state[1]
park_wells <- cache[[paste0(state_abbr, "_wells")]] %>%
  st_filter(pb %>% st_transform(4269)) %>%
  st_transform(4326)

mapview(pb, layer.name = "Park Boundary", col.regions = "seagreen") +
  mapview(bldg_all %>% st_centroid(), layer.name = "Buildings", col.regions = "tomato", cex = 4) +
  mapview(pois_all, layer.name = "POIs", col.regions = "orange", cex = 4) +
  mapview(park_wells, layer.name = "Wells Inside Park", col.regions = "blue", cex = 3)
```
